headline: Scam Response Centre Recovers RM520 Million for Victims
context: Bank Negara National Scam Response Centre recovered RM520 million through rapid account-freezing in 2025.

cards.big: Scam response centre recovered RM520 million for fraud victims in 2025
cards.sub: 24-hour account freezing saves funds before scammers transfer them

cards.big: NSRC processed 128,000 reports freezing 85,000 accounts within 24 hours
cards.sub: Recovery rate improved from 12% in 2023 to 28% in 2025

cards.big: Average time from report to freeze reduced from 72 hours to 8 hours
cards.sub: Bank cooperation improved after BNM mandated 2-hour response

cards.big: Total losses of RM2.8 billion mean RM520 million is only 18.5% recovery
cards.sub: Remaining RM2.28 billion transferred to mule accounts or overseas

cards.big: Recovery rates test whether rapid response can close the gap between losses and recoveries
RM520 million recovered by scam response centre. Recovery rates matter more than total losses reported.
